classification.evidence: All 900 prior training rows made system and user content loss-bearing.
Role order and Qwen chat template are consistent; response-style differences are accounted for by category 3.
Only 200 of 1000 assistant targets use the evaluator-required terminal-answer contract.
Both adapters pass enabled, disabled, re-enabled, inventory, scaling, and base-restoration checks.
Not selected because the previous formatting was not assistant-only and lacked a uniform terminal contract.
No additional directly evidenced cause is needed for the corrective protocol gate.
Concrete correctable protocol defects are resolved diagnostically, although retention smokes must test the correction.
